rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding only valid implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex
Do not add guarantees to implementation annexes
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Remove guarantees that reference subcomponent paths or implementation-only identifiers
generic_rules: Place implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex
Use only valid output features or declared auxiliary variables for assign statements
Write guarantees in component type annexes that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Remove guarantees that reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Do not use package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annex guarantees
Do not add guarantees that reference unresolved identifiers
